---
title: "My Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    logo: image_logo.png
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
##### Install package (only needed the first time)#####
# install.packages("flexdashboard")
# install.packages("dplyr")
# install.packages("DT")
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("ggpmisc")
# install.packages("leaflet")
#######################################################


library(flexdashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpmisc)
library(DT)
library(leaflet)

# Import csv processed data-set

join_df_ab_genus <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_ab_genus.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
join_df_rich <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_rich.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
richness_df <-read.csv("processed_data/richness_df.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
abundance_df_genus <-read.csv("processed_data/abundance_df_genus.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# External Variable

landuse_map_url <- "https://geo.agriculture.gov.au/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer"

landuse_map_layer <-4

landuse_map_attribute <- "ABARES 2022, Land use of Australia 2010–11 to 2015–16, 250 m, ABARES, Canberra, September CC BY 4.0."

landuse_legend_image_url <- paste0("https://geo.agriculture.gov.au:443/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer?request=GetLegendGraphic%26version=1.3.0%26format=image/png%26layer=",landuse_map_layer)

landuse_legend_image_html <-paste0("<h5>Land Use Type</h5><img src='",landuse_legend_image_url, "'style='width:300px'>")


```

Scatter Plot
=======================================================================

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Genus Abundance in QLD

```{r}
join_df_ab_genus %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD"&
          taxonGenus %in% c("Acacia", "Eucalyptus")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = average_soil_pH_unitless, 
             y = abundance,
              color = taxonGenus)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~"),color=taxonGenus),
               formula = y ~ x,
               parse = TRUE)

```

### Species Richness in QLD 


```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x,
               parse = TRUE,
               label.x = 5,
               label.y = 15)

```


Violin Box plot
=======================================================================

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Genus Abundance vs. soil texture  in QLD

```{r}
join_df_ab_genus %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD"&
    soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand", "Clay loam") &
         taxonGenus %in% c("Acacia"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = abundance,
              color = taxonGenus)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


### Genus Abundance vs. climate  in QLD

```{r}
join_df_ab_genus %>%
  filter(!is.na(climaticCondition) &
           stateCode %in% "QD"&
         taxonGenus %in% c("Acacia"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = climaticCondition, 
             y = abundance,
              color = taxonGenus)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


### Species Richness vs. soil texture  in QLD

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD"&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% c("Sand", "Clay loam"))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


### Species Richness vs. climate  in QLD

```{r}
join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% "QD"&
           !is.na(climaticCondition))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = climaticCondition, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
```


Interactive Map
=======================================================================


Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Species Richness Map

```{r}
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "Reds",   # light → dark
  domain = richness_df$unique_species_count
)

richness_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_species_count))%>%
  leaflet() %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
      addWMSTiles(
        baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
        layers = landuse_map_layer,
        options = WMSTileOptions(
          format = "image/png",
          transparent = TRUE
        ),
        group = "Land Use",
        attribution = landuse_map_attribute
      )%>%
   
      addControl(
        html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
        position = "bottomleft"
        )%>%
      
      
      addLayersControl(
        baseGroups = c("Base", "Satellite","Land Use"),
        options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
      )%>%
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = ~longitude_Degree,
        lat = ~latitude_Degree,
        color = "black",
        weight = 1,
        fillColor = ~pal(unique_species_count),
        fillOpacity = 0.8,
        radius = 5,
        popup = ~paste0(
            "<b>Unique Species Number:</b> ", unique_species_count
            )
      ) %>%
      addLegend(
        "bottomright",
        pal = pal,
        values = ~unique_species_count,
        title = "Species Richness(unique count)",
        opacity = 1)


```



### Genus distribution Map

```{r}

abundance_df_genus %>%
  filter(taxonGenus %in% c("Acacia", "Eucalyptus")) %>%
  {
    pal <- colorFactor(
      palette = c("blue", "red"),
      domain = .$taxonGenus   # only filtered categories
    )
    leaflet(.) %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
      addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
      addWMSTiles(
            baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
            layers = landuse_map_layer,
            options = WMSTileOptions(
              format = "image/png",
              transparent = TRUE
            ),
            group = "Land Use",
            attribution = landuse_map_attribute
          )%>%
       
      addControl(
        html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
        position = "bottomleft"
        )%>%
      addLayersControl(
        baseGroups = c("Base", "Satellite","Land Use"),
        options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
      )%>%
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = ~longitude_Degree,
        lat = ~latitude_Degree,
        radius = ~abundance/30,
        color = ~pal(taxonGenus),
        fillOpacity = 0.5,
        popup = ~paste0(
            "<b>Taxon Name:</b> ", taxonGenus,
            "<br><b>Abundance:</b> ", abundance
            )
      )%>%
      addLegend(
          "bottomright",
          pal = pal,
          values = ~taxonGenus,
          title = "Genus"
      )
}

```
